narrative_beat: Close macro de mao encapuzada inserindo chave mestra dourada em fechadura de porta escura

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a gloved hooded hand holding an aged golden master key, inserting it into a dark wooden door lock
subject.focal_point: the golden key turning into the keyhole with crimson glint
subject.secondary: Dark wooden door grain, iron rivets, shadow of hooded figure on the door

composition.rule: off-center close macro, key at golden third
composition.foreground: gloved hand and golden key in crimson-amber light
composition.midground: dark wooden door with iron details
composition.background: desaturated grayscale of empty corridor receding into black

lighting.key_light: single warm candlelight from lower-right casting raking amber on key

style.post_processing: halation on key highlight, crushed blacks, heavy grain, amber warmth only on foreground
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, metallic key scratches

symbolism.primary: the Lord arriving as a thief in the night

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus on key and hand

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.

narration_excerpt: Mas o dia do Senhor vira como ladrao de noite.
